raw_consumer_statement: I never received an online order but merchant not reply back anymore so I contact credit card company American Express to dispute the charge and provided with police report. But my case was closed and said merchant provided supporting documents so they denied my claim and ask me to contact merchant directly to reslove the issue. But merchant not reply email and no one answer the calls too. Thats a scam website. I went to police department again today and officer write down his name and contact number on the police report and ask me to contact American Express again. But they reopen my case and closed the case again with same letter. And reopen again and closed again. I think they reopen and closed the case more than XXXX times. On merchant provid documents shows location is XXXX but their website said location is New York. I did not get anything from this order and police officer filed report for me proof it too but American Express still bill me with the amount. I dont get protection from credit card company? Hope CFPB could assist me please
